MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-17-2020 IN 206, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL DATE. DEFENDANT PHILIP NICHOLSEN APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT VIA COURTCALL. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/5/20 IS CONTINUED TO 10/4/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE PRETRIAL DEADLINES INCLUDING DISCOVERY, EXPERT DISCLOSURES AND MOTION PRACTICE REMAIN GOVERNED BY THE 10/5/20 TRIAL DATE. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION WHICH IS IN VIOLATION OF SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE FOR THE CONTINUANCE WHICH IS THE COST FOR FILING PAPERS THAT DEFENDANT WOULD HAVE TO FILE AGAIN WITH A COURTESY COPY IN ORDER TO GET THE 10/4/21 TRIAL DATE. MR. NICHOLSEN TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
